message:
test(node): add DGIS cross-barrier-kind not_applicable receipt tests and fix SSRF assertion

New barrier_primitives tests verify that check methods return proper
not_applicable receipts when only a different barrier kind is configured
(e.g., checking sandbox escalation when only a firewall barrier exists).
A second test verifies that these not_applicable receipts are preserved
in both the in-memory audit log and JSONL export.

The DGIS barrier gate script is updated to require both new test names.

SSRF policy test fixed to use pattern matching (matches!) instead of
string comparison on error codes, which is more robust against enum
variant changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
